enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder on April 26, 2017, reporting he just returned from the dentist with a numb mouth. He describes his ongoing work on a Roman timeline website he has been building since 2011, his plan to grind on it through the week and reassess monetization at the start of May, and his discomfort from smoking pipe resin due to no regular cannabis being available.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: strongly pro-legalization; believes illegal status forced him to smoke harmful resin for years and damaged his health
regrets it; says it causes him severe asthma and he won't do it anymore
committed to pushing hard on it this week before pivoting back to money-making efforts in May
